Table 2 shows the primary clinical presentations and
outcomes of the patients. Overall, 62.75% (91 out of
145) of the cases were culture positive. The overall mor-
tality rate in the culture positive cases was 45.05% com-
pared to only 14.8% in culture negative but sero-positive
monia accounted for 42.06% of primary clinical presen-
